goal: Connect the first Overview screen to the admitted local safe transport without adding other render screens or changing runtime truth.

layer_boundary.ui_layer: Builds fixed bridge requests and renders transport, bridge, and action result states.
layer_boundary.bridge_layer: Continues to validate operation_id and action_id in backend-owned overview_bridge.
layer_boundary.command_layer: Remains the only runtime truth path through strict JSON command surfaces.
layer_boundary.state_logs: Not read directly by UI or transport.

endpoint_rule.test_source: transport query parameter only when bridge=transport

verification.command: python3 -m unittest tests.test_desktop_ui_command_adapter tests.test_desktop_ui_overview_actions tests.test_desktop_ui_overview_bridge tests.test_desktop_ui_overview_implantation tests.test_desktop_ui_overview_live_binding tests.test_desktop_ui_overview_transport tests.test_desktop_ui_static

rg -n "status --json|healthcheck --json|mode set|accounts promote|rollout stage|policy stage|evidence capture|stable target switch|command_adapter|overview_bridge|XMLHttpRequest|child_process|window\\.pywebview|localhost" wild_boar_proxy/desktop_ui/screens/overview.js
browser visual smoke against local static server plus local safe transport
verification.observed: transport_live state, live snapshot + admitted transport, refresh returned Overview snapshot refreshed.

residual_risks: query-param transport endpoint remains available only with localhost-only validation
